heading: distinct() Example: Full File
body:
> **Note:** 
>
> Example Setup
>
> This example connects to an instance of MongoDB by using a
> connection URI. To learn more about connecting to your MongoDB
> instance, see the [Connect to MongoDB](node-connect) guide. This example
> also uses the `movies` collection in the `sample_mflix` database
> included in the [Atlas sample datasets](atlas/sample-data). You
> can load them into your database on the free tier of MongoDB Atlas by
> following the [MongoDB Get Started](get-started).

The following snippet retrieves a list of distinct values for the `year`
document field from the `movies` collection. It uses a query document to
match movies that include `"Barbara Streisand"` in the `director` array.

JavaScript

TypeScript

Running the preceding example, results in the following output:

```json
[ 1983, 1991, 1996 ]
```
